dimensions.name: register_match
dimensions.description: Does the interviewer's writing style match the persona's? Sentence length, vocabulary, punctuation, hedging/filler, and emotional temperature.

dimensions.name: flow
dimensions.description: Does each question thread naturally from the previous answer? Every question should pick up a specific phrase or thread from the last answer.

dimensions.name: sufficiency_timing
dimensions.description: Did intake stop at the right moment? Should stop when the decision, what makes it hard, and 2+ concrete facts are all on the table.

dimensions.name: context_block_quality
dimensions.description: Is the composed context block well-structured and useful for generating divergent directions? TENSION anchored in user's words, DIMENSIONS forcing different directions, ASSUMPTIONS tagged correctly.

dimensions.name: hidden_truth_surfacing
dimensions.description: Did the intake surface or flag the hidden truth from the persona? Should be directly surfaced during conversation AND correctly reflected in the context block.

dimensions.name: feature_test
dimensions.description: Did the tested protocol feature work correctly? All tested features should fire correctly, at the right moment, with correct behavior.
